name: Hyper Pet Flippy Flopper Flying Disc Dog Toy, Color Varies, 9-in
description: Help your dog spend his boundless reserves of energy with the Hyper Pet Flippy Flopper Flying Disc. This interactive toss and fetch toy will provide hours of playtime for you and your furry friend. Made from soft rubber and nylon, the toy measures nine inches in diameter and comes in a variety of colors. It’s safe for your pal’s teeth and durable enough to withstand daily play sessions. The flying dog toy acts like a frisbee and floats in water, plus it complies with children’s toy standards, so you can feel safe about letting your kids have fun with it too. Choose from a 1-pack, 2-pack or 5-pack!
